changes.before: The answer rose sharp and died before it left her mouth.
changes.after: She had a sharp answer ready and bit it back before it left her mouth.

changes.before: Sylvanas was not needling her. She was shaving the thought down to what could be used.
changes.after: Sylvanas was shaving the thought down to what could be used.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → extra-sweep inanimate-subject agency smear
changes.before: Stratholme's outer farms wore the city's appetite openly: long barns, mill sheds, kitchen plots ragged from harvest traffic, smoke from ovens too small to be anything but household work.
changes.after: Long barns, mill sheds, kitchen plots ragged from harvest traffic, and smoke from ovens too small to be anything but household work made the city's appetite plain.

changes.before: Stratholme held together by habit and traffic law.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → extra-sweep inanimate-subject agency smear
changes.after: Workers shouted, carts jolted, and people broke in every direction.

changes.before: She staggered back into a lane with too many answers in it.
changes.after: She staggered back into the lane.

changes.before: All around them, proof kept piling up: warm rolls under cloth, half a loaf on an old man's knee, bread cooling on a board behind an open kitchen door.
changes.after: All around them, warm rolls sat under cloth, half a loaf rested on an old man's knee, and bread cooled on a board behind an open kitchen door.

changes.before: The count kept multiplying faster than her mind could hold it.
changes.after: More loaves, baskets, and hands kept entering her view faster than she could hold them in her head.

changes.before: It hurt less than she had feared and more.
No title. No courtesy. Only that.
The city sat at her back like weight she could not shrug off.
changes.after: At her back, the city was impossible to ignore.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → pattern 7 absence given motion
changes.before: Silence spread through the officers around them.
changes.after: The officers around them fell silent.
